config_info.name: Maternal Reference SCA Detection
config_info.description: Maternal population reference data for SCA detection (Female only)
config_info.note: Mom reference is only for female SCA detection (XO/XXX). No male detection needed.

male.reason: Mom reference does not require male SCA detection (XXY/XYY)
male.description: Male SCA detection not applicable for maternal reference

female.description: Maternal female reference data for XO/XXX detection

male.message: Male SCA detection not required for maternal reference

steps: 1. If z_score < xo_threshold and ur_x in [xo_ur_x_min, xo_ur_x_max]: XO Detected
2. If z_score < xo_mosaicism_threshold and ur_x < xo_max: XO Mom Mosaicism
3. If z_score < xo_suspected_threshold and ur_x in XO range: XO Suspected
4. If z_score > xxx_threshold and ur_x in [xxx_ur_x_min, xxx_ur_x_max]: XXX Detected
5. If z_score > xxx_mosaicism_threshold and ur_x > xxx_min: XXX Mom Mosaicism
6. If z_score > xxx_suspected_threshold and ur_x in XXX range: XXX Suspected
7. If z_score in [z_normal_min, z_normal_max] and ur_x in [ur_x_min, ur_x_max]: Normal
priority: Mosaicism detection has higher priority than regular detection
Suspected cases are intermediate between normal and detected

male.message: Male plotting not applicable for maternal reference

considerations: Maternal age effects on SCA detection
Different threshold values due to maternal biology

middle_age_mother.description: Slightly adjusted thresholds for middle-age mothers

elderly_mother.description: More conservative thresholds for elderly mothers
